headlines.headline: Strynal Industries withdraws from Latin America market citing unfavorable conditions

sentiment.reasoning: Exiting a regional market represents a contraction of operations and a loss of future revenue streams.

headlines.headline: Wyrnor Solutions announces $3.8B share buyback program

sentiment.reasoning: A large share buyback program typically signals management confidence and provides immediate support to the stock price.

headlines.headline: Yorven Labs begins scheduled maintenance of wireless connectivity systems

sentiment.reasoning: Scheduled maintenance is a routine operational activity that is expected and typically has no material financial impact.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
